Everything I've built

My Website Portfolio — __COUNT__ projects

Every website, app, background, and showcase across my Documents folder. Click Open ↗ on any card — it launches the live site in a new tab.

Served from localhost:8000 (this page). Two extras: Hargrove has a live booking backend at http://localhost:8787, and a few React/Vite sites need npm run dev in their folder before they fully render (marked React).
No sites match that search.
Static server rooted at ~/Documents on port 8000 · clicking a card opens the real project in a new tab, where you can preview/interact with it freely. Stop the server with lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill.
